pkgmetadata.longdescription: llvmlite is a lightweight LLVM Python binding for writing JIT compilers. It provides a small subset of the LLVM C++ API wrapped in a Pythonic interface. This is a prebuilt binary package from PyPI wheels.
llvmlite是一个轻量级的LLVM Python绑定，用于编写JIT编译器。它提供了LLVM C++ API的一小部分子集，封装在Python风格的接口中。这是一个来自PyPI wheel 的预构建二进制包。
